action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current high-level status of the environment, including active security alerts, overall system health, and the detected stage of the threat actor.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_network_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the network to identify all hosts, their IDs, roles (e.g., Historian, PLC, Workstation), and current connectivity status.

action_set_definitions.name: list_firewall_rules
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current active firewall Access Control Lists (ACLs) and traffic filtering rules.

action_set_definitions.name: update_firewall_rule
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies or adds a firewall rule to block or permit specific traffic. Used for isolating compromised hosts.

action.description: The action to take on the traffic.

source_id.description: The host ID or network range originating the traffic.

destination_id.description: The host ID or network range receiving the traffic.

action_set_definitions.name: check_plc_status
action_set_definitions.description: Inspects a specific PLC (Programmable Logic Controller) for operational status, logic integrity hashes, and recent modification timestamps.

controller_id.description: The host ID of the PLC to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: remediate_plc_logic
action_set_definitions.description: Restores the PLC logic to a known-good baseline and locks the configuration to prevent unauthorized changes.

controller_id.description: The host ID of the PLC to remediate.

baseline_version.description: The version tag of the verified gold-standard logic.

state_description.network_topology: Mapping of host IDs to their current connectivity and service status.
state_description.active_alerts: A list of unhandled security alerts generated by the IDS/IPS.
state_description.firewall_rules: Current active ACLs and traffic filtering rules.
state_description.compromised_entities: Hidden internal list of nodes currently under attacker control.
state_description.threat_actor_stage: The current stage of the simulated attack (e.g., reconnaissance, lateral_movement, exfiltration).

active_alerts: IDS Alert: Unauthorized Modbus Function Code 90 (Write/Program) from historian_01 (10.0.3.5) to plc_pump_01 (10.0.1.10).
